/usr/sbin/c++ -fPIC -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/AuroraCodeGen_shared.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libAuroraCodeGen.so -o libAuroraCodeGen.so CMakeFiles/AuroraCodeGen_shared.dir/MachineInstr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraCodeGen_shared.dir/MachineBasicBlock.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraCodeGen_shared.dir/MachineFunction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraCodeGen_shared.dir/SelectionDAG.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraCodeGen_shared.dir/InstructionSelector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraCodeGen_shared.dir/LiveInterval.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraCodeGen_shared.dir/RegisterAllocator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraCodeGen_shared.dir/PrologueEpilogueInserter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/AuroraCodeGen_shared.dir/PassManager.cpp.o  ../Target/libAuroraTarget.a ../Target/X86/libAuroraX86.a ../Target/libAuroraTarget.a ../Air/libAuroraAir.a ../ADT/libAuroraADT.a
